resolved_blockers.title: Instruction-file overwrite patch conflict
resolved_blockers.resolution: Used explicit delete-and-recreate flow for deterministic content replacement

resolved_blockers.title: Visualizer preview generation is not using a working mask-guided AI path
resolved_blockers.resolution: Removed deterministic fallback execution from the visualizer action pipeline, installed @gradio/client, switched the default HF backend to a working public multi-image edit Space, and validated real HF generation directly against the Space with source-plus-reference inputs.
